title: Liquidity ratios
summary: 9609 A Level — current and acid test ratios.

simpleExplanation.title: Can bills be paid?
simpleExplanation.summary: Liquidity ratios measure ability to pay short-term debts from current assets.
steps: Too high may mean idle assets.

sections.content: **Liquidity ratios** (10.2.1) start **10.2 analysis**. Always **quote formula + interpret**.
